xml.verse: Life is like a hurricane here in Duck - burg Race cars, lasers, aeroplanes it's a, duck - blur! Might solve a mystery, or rewrite hist'ry! Duck Tales! oo woo oo Every day they're out there making Duck Tales! oo woo oo Tales of daring do bad and good luck tales! whooh ooh When it seems they're heading for the final curtain Cool deduction never fails that's for certain The worst of messes become successes
xml.chorus: Duck Tales! whooh ooh Every day they're out there making Duck Tales! whooh ooh Tales of daring do bad and good luck tales! whooh ooh
xml.refrain: D - D - D - Danger! Watch behind you! There's a stranger, out to find you! What to do? Just grab on to some Duck Tales
xml.chorus: Duck Tales! oo woo oo Every day they're out there making Duck Tales! oo woo oo Tales of daring do bad and good luck tales! oo woo oo
xml.refrain: D - D - D - Danger! Watch behind you! There's a stranger, out to find you! What to do? Just grab on to some Duck Tales! oo woo oo Every day they're out there making
xml.outro: Duck Tales! oo woo oo Tales of daring do bad and good luck tales! whooh ooh Everyday they're out there making
Duck Tales! oo woo oo Tales of daring do bad and good luck tales! oo woo oo Not pony tales or cotton tales, no Duck Tales! oo woo oo
